gpt55_review_summary: Boole the 3rd approved the patch with no release-readiness blockers, regression risks, missing tests, or unclear docs.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Rejected successful terminal Databricks run-status sidecars that still report active_task_key.
Documented the active task pointer invariant in the release-bundle README contract.
why: Release bundles only accept successful terminal Databricks run-status sidecars, so compact status evidence should not preserve an active task pointer from a still-running run.
